notes: Ecuador have a clean bill of health with no injuries or suspensions, but Beccacece may tweak his midfield shape; Germany are without Nico Schlotterbeck (tournament-ending ankle ligament injury vs Ivory Coast) and Nathaniel Brown (minor adductor issue), though Nagelsmann confirmed only those two enforced changes and will largely field his strongest XI rather than rotate heavily.
